pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the libGDX library version from 1.10.0 to 1.13.1 to support newer features and JDK compatibility.
Add the libGDX headless backend dependency to allow running tests without a graphical display.
Add libGDX freetype dependency for dynamic font rendering capabilities.
Add libGDX freetype platform natives for desktop execution.
Upgrade JUnit Jupiter to a newer version managed by the JUnit BOM for better test framework support.
Add JUnit platform reporting dependency to enable XML test result output.
Add OpenTest4J dependency for standard assertion failure exceptions.
Add Hamcrest dependency for advanced matcher assertions in tests.
Add Mockito dependency for mocking objects in unit tests.
Add SLF4J API dependency for logging abstraction.
Add SLF4J simple implementation for basic logging output.
Add SpotBugs Maven plugin for static code analysis.
Add Maven Enforcer plugin to ensure minimum Maven version requirements.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage measurement.
Add Maven Failsafe plugin for running integration tests.
Configure Surefire plugin to enable Open Test Reporting XML output.
Upgrade Maven Shade plugin version to 3.6.0 for better uber-jar creation.
Upgrade Maven Compiler plugin version to 3.13.0 for better JDK 21 support.
Upgrade Maven Surefire plugin version to 3.5.2 for modern test execution.
Upgrade Maven Exec plugin version to 3.5.0 for running applications.
Upgrade Maven Clean plugin version to 3.4.0.
Upgrade Maven Site plugin version to 4.0.0-M16.
Upgrade Maven Resources plugin version to 3.3.1.
Upgrade Maven JAR plugin version to 3.4.2.
Upgrade Maven Install plugin version to 3.1.3.
Upgrade Maven Deploy plugin version to 3.1.3.
Add Versions Maven plugin to help manage dependency and plugin version updates.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add patterns to ignore common backup and editor swap files to keep the repository clean.
Ignore the dependency-reduced-pom.xml generated by the Maven Shade Plugin to prevent committing build artifacts.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the generic INF112 Maven template README with specific documentation for the 'Big Head Kickerz' game project.
README.md.human_impl: Removed generic Maven setup instructions and ANTLR snippets; added project title, team info, game description, and controls.

README.md.general_idea: Added a visual screenshot of the game to the README to showcase the project.
README.md.human_impl: Added markdown image link pointing to `/docs/screenshot.jpg`.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the running instructions to reflect the specific build output and Java version requirements of the final project.
README.md.human_impl: Changed instructions to use `mvn package` and `java -jar target/big-head-kickerz-1.0-SNAPSHOT-fat.jar`, specifying Java 21.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the empty 'Known bugs' section with a detailed list of current physics and collision issues in the game.
README.md.human_impl: Listed specific bugs regarding ball-player collisions, powerup effects, and foot physics.

README.md.general_idea: Added a credits section acknowledging the sources for assets, sounds, and inspiration used in the game.
README.md.human_impl: Added links to Kongregate, Fandom, Wikipedia, Freesound, and other asset providers.
